title: Realjoy 5D Diamond Painting Kits for Adults Kids Crafts Diamond Art Kits Full Drill Painting Rhinestone Embroidery Pictures for Home Decor(30x40cm)
features: 1.Diamond Art Set: Include 1 HD Canvas without frame , Plastic Tray, Sticky Pen and Clay, and a sufficient amount of Rubik's Cube Diamonds (add 30% extra). The canvas size is 11.8*15.7 inches (30*40cm).

2.DIY Diamond Painting Art: 5D diamond painting is the new popular DIY decoration, compared with traditional cross stitch, it can be preserved for many years and never fade. Children's diamond painting set can improve children's hands-on ability, cultivate children's self-discipline, and develop good habits of concentration and patience.

3.Preferred materials: The diamond painting set adopts the full-color magic cube round diamonds, with high gloss, small gaps, and more natural picture transitions. The canvas is waterproof and durable, resistant to wrinkling and pulling, and the symbols are clearly legible.

4.Perfect for decoration:this diamond painting is designed for beginners with easy operation. The whole set is colorful and three-dimensional, you can hang it in the living room or bedroom, it will be a great decorative painting for home and office.
5.After-sale service: If the diamond art set you received is missing diamonds or tools, please contact us in time, we will provide you with diamonds and tools for free.
description: Product Description Waterproof The surface of the diamond painting is smooth and flat, and the high-quality material ensures durability Shiny Diamonds The diamond color is bright and long-lasting, and each diamond painting set has an additional 30% diamonds HD Printing The symbols on the canvas are clear and easy to read, and adults or children can quickly get started
